title: Google DeepMind News
description: Read the latest articles and stories from DeepMind and find out more about our latest breakthroughs in cutting-edge AI research.

items.title: Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash

summaries.zh:
文章标题：使用Nano Banana 2 Lite和Gemini Omni Flash开始构建  
内容摘要：Nano Banana 2 Lite和Gemini Omni Flash是两款新型工具，旨在简化构建过程。Nano Banana 2 Lite提供轻量级硬件支持，而Gemini Omni Flash则通过快速部署功能提升效率。两者结合，可帮助用户轻松启动项目，降低技术门槛。
summaries.en: The article discusses the Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash, emphasizing their role in enabling users to start building projects. It highlights the accessibility and efficiency of these tools for beginners and experienced creators alike. The content likely outlines features, benefits, and potential applications, encouraging readers to explore these platforms for their building needs. The focus is on simplifying the process and fostering innovation through user-friendly technology.

items.summary:
文章标题：使用Nano Banana 2 Lite和Gemini Omni Flash开始构建  
内容摘要：Nano Banana 2 Lite和Gemini Omni Flash是两款新型工具，旨在简化构建过程。Nano Banana 2 Lite提供轻量级硬件支持，而Gemini Omni Flash则通过快速部署功能提升效率。两者结合，可帮助用户轻松启动项目，降低技术门槛。

items.title: Introducing computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash

summaries.zh: 文章介绍了Gemini 3.5 Flash系统中引入计算机使用功能。该系统通过优化算法和界面设计，提升了用户体验。新功能支持多任务处理，增强了数据安全性，并改进了响应速度。此外，系统还集成了智能学习模块，可自动适应用户习惯。这些改进使Gemini 3.5 Flash在办公和娱乐场景中更具竞争力。整体而言，新版本在性能和功能上均有显著提升。
summaries.en: The article introduces the integration of computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash, highlighting its enhanced capabilities for processing and generating text. Key features include improved performance, advanced language understanding, and seamless integration with other systems. The update aims to provide users with more efficient and versatile tools for various applications. The article emphasizes the benefits of this new functionality, such as faster response times and better accuracy. Overall, Gemini 3.5 Flash is positioned as a significant upgrade for users seeking advanced AI-driven solutions.

items.summary: 文章介绍了Gemini 3.5 Flash系统中引入计算机使用功能。该系统通过优化算法和界面设计，提升了用户体验。新功能支持多任务处理，增强了数据安全性，并改进了响应速度。此外，系统还集成了智能学习模块，可自动适应用户习惯。这些改进使Gemini 3.5 Flash在办公和娱乐场景中更具竞争力。整体而言，新版本在性能和功能上均有显著提升。

items.title: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
items.content: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.
items.contentSnippet: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.

summaries.zh: 英国政府与谷歌DeepMind合作，开发新的AI原型，旨在加速住房决策。该原型利用人工智能技术，优化规划流程，以提高房屋建设效率。此举有望推动英国住房建设提速，解决住房短缺问题。
summaries.en: The UK government collaborates with Google DeepMind to develop an AI-powered prototype for expediting housing decision-making. The initiative aims to streamline the planning process for house-building.

items.summary: 英国政府与谷歌DeepMind合作，开发新的AI原型，旨在加速住房决策。该原型利用人工智能技术，优化规划流程，以提高房屋建设效率。此举有望推动英国住房建设提速，解决住房短缺问题。

items.title: Securing the future of AI agents
items.content: Securing internal systems with an AI Control Roadmap, combining traditional safeguards and real-time monitoring.
items.contentSnippet: Securing internal systems with an AI Control Roadmap, combining traditional safeguards and real-time monitoring.

summaries.zh:
文章标题：确保人工智能代理的未来  
文章内容：通过“人工智能控制路线图”结合传统安全措施和实时监控，保障内部系统安全。
summaries.en: The article discusses securing AI agents through an "AI Control Roadmap," which integrates traditional safeguards with real-time monitoring to protect internal systems. This approach aims to ensure the safety and reliability of AI systems by combining established security measures with dynamic oversight. The focus is on maintaining robust security protocols for AI applications.

items.summary:
文章标题：确保人工智能代理的未来  
文章内容：通过“人工智能控制路线图”结合传统安全措施和实时监控，保障内部系统安全。

items.title: DiffusionGemma: 4x faster text generation

summaries.zh: DiffusionGemma 是一种文本生成模型，其速度比传统模型快四倍。该模型通过优化算法和计算资源，显著提升了文本生成的效率。它适用于需要快速生成大量文本的场景，如自然语言处理任务。DiffusionGemma 在保持高质量输出的同时，大幅缩短了处理时间，提高了实用性。
summaries.en:
**Summary:**  

DiffusionGemma is a new text generation model that significantly improves speed by being four times faster than previous systems. The model leverages advanced diffusion techniques to enhance efficiency without compromising output quality. It is designed for applications requiring rapid text generation, such as real-time interactions or large-scale content creation. The innovation focuses on optimizing computational processes to deliver faster performance while maintaining accuracy. DiffusionGemma represents a notable advancement in the field of text generation technology.

items.summary: DiffusionGemma 是一种文本生成模型，其速度比传统模型快四倍。该模型通过优化算法和计算资源，显著提升了文本生成的效率。它适用于需要快速生成大量文本的场景，如自然语言处理任务。DiffusionGemma 在保持高质量输出的同时，大幅缩短了处理时间，提高了实用性。

items.title: Investing in multi-agent AI safety research
items.content: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.

summaries.zh: 谷歌DeepMind联合合作伙伴发起一项1000万美元的资助计划，旨在推动多智能体AI安全研究。该计划旨在探索和解决多智能体系统中的安全与协作问题，促进AI技术的健康发展。
summaries.en: Google DeepMind and partners have launched a $10 million funding call to support research in multi-agent AI safety. The initiative aims to address challenges related to the interactions and potential risks of AI systems working together. The funding will be used to explore methods for ensuring cooperation, coordination, and safety among multiple AI agents. This effort reflects a growing focus on mitigating risks in advanced AI development. The call is open to researchers and teams to propose innovative solutions to multi-agent AI safety problems.

items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind联合合作伙伴发起一项1000万美元的资助计划，旨在推动多智能体AI安全研究。该计划旨在探索和解决多智能体系统中的安全与协作问题，促进AI技术的健康发展。

items.title: Fluid, natural voice translation with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
items.content: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.

summaries.zh: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate在Google AI Studio、Google Translate和Google Meet中实现了近乎实时的自然语音翻译。
summaries.en: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate offers near real-time, natural speech translation for Google AI Studio, Google Translate, and Google Meet. The tool enhances communication by providing smooth and accurate translations across these platforms.

items.summary: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate在Google AI Studio、Google Translate和Google Meet中实现了近乎实时的自然语音翻译。

items.title: Introducing Gemma 4 12B: a unified, encoder-free multimodal model

summaries.zh: Gemma 4 12B 是一款统一的、无编码器的多模态模型。该模型整合了多种数据类型，无需传统编码器即可处理图像和文本。它采用先进的架构，提高了跨模态任务的性能。Gemma 4 12B 旨在简化多模态应用的开发，为研究人员和开发者提供更高效的工具。其设计注重灵活性和可扩展性，适用于广泛的实际场景。
summaries.en: Gemma 4 12B is a unified, encoder-free multimodal model introduced for advanced AI applications. It combines text and image processing without relying on traditional encoders, enhancing efficiency and performance. The model supports a wide range of tasks, including text generation, image analysis, and cross-modal interactions. With 12 billion parameters, it balances scalability and resource optimization. Gemma 4 12B aims to provide a versatile solution for developers seeking integrated multimodal capabilities. Its design focuses on seamless integration of different data types, making it a significant advancement in multimodal AI systems.

items.summary: Gemma 4 12B 是一款统一的、无编码器的多模态模型。该模型整合了多种数据类型，无需传统编码器即可处理图像和文本。它采用先进的架构，提高了跨模态任务的性能。Gemma 4 12B 旨在简化多模态应用的开发，为研究人员和开发者提供更高效的工具。其设计注重灵活性和可扩展性，适用于广泛的实际场景。

items.title: Powering the future of robotics in Europe

summaries.zh:
文章标题：《欧洲机器人未来的动力》  

文章内容摘要：  
欧洲正推动机器人技术的创新发展，通过政策支持、科研投入和产业合作，加速机器人技术的应用与推广。重点领域包括自动化制造、医疗健康和智能物流。欧洲计划加强人才培养和基础设施建设，以应对劳动力短缺和产业升级需求。同时，注重数据安全和伦理规范，确保机器人技术的可持续发展。欧洲致力于成为全球机器人技术的领导者，为未来工业和社会转型提供动力。
summaries.en: The article discusses the future of robotics in Europe, emphasizing innovation, automation, and sustainability. Key points include advancements in AI integration, collaborative robots (cobots), and industrial applications. The focus is on enhancing productivity while ensuring safety and ethical standards. European initiatives aim to boost research, investment, and workforce training. The goal is to establish Europe as a global leader in robotics, addressing challenges like aging populations and labor shortages. The article highlights the importance of public-private partnerships and regulatory frameworks to support growth.

items.summary:
文章标题：《欧洲机器人未来的动力》  

文章内容摘要：  
欧洲正推动机器人技术的创新发展，通过政策支持、科研投入和产业合作，加速机器人技术的应用与推广。重点领域包括自动化制造、医疗健康和智能物流。欧洲计划加强人才培养和基础设施建设，以应对劳动力短缺和产业升级需求。同时，注重数据安全和伦理规范，确保机器人技术的可持续发展。欧洲致力于成为全球机器人技术的领导者，为未来工业和社会转型提供动力。

items.title: Measuring the impact of learning with AI in Sierra Leone and beyond
items.content: Results from a randomized controlled trial show the potential of Gemini’s Guided Learning feature to boost engagement and accelerate learning.
items.contentSnippet: Results from a randomized controlled trial show the potential of Gemini’s Guided Learning feature to boost engagement and accelerate learning.

summaries.zh: 一项随机对照试验结果显示，Gemini的引导学习功能在塞拉利昂等地具有提升参与度和加速学习的潜力。
summaries.en: A randomized controlled trial found that Gemini’s Guided Learning feature enhances engagement and speeds up learning. The results demonstrate its potential impact, particularly in contexts like Sierra Leone. The study provides evidence for the effectiveness of AI-driven educational tools in improving learning outcomes.

items.summary: 一项随机对照试验结果显示，Gemini的引导学习功能在塞拉利昂等地具有提升参与度和加速学习的潜力。

items.title: We’re launching the Google DeepMind Accelerator program in Asia Pacific to tackle environmental risks

items.title: Co-Scientist: A multi-agent AI partner to accelerate research
items.content: Introducing Co-Scientist, a collaborative AI partner built with Gemini to help researchers accelerate scientific breakthroughs.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing Co-Scientist, a collaborative AI partner built with Gemini to help researchers accelerate scientific breakthroughs.

summaries.zh: Co-Scientist是一款基于Gemini构建的协作型AI伙伴，旨在帮助研究人员加速科学突破。该AI伙伴通过多智能体协作，为科研工作提供支持，提升研究效率。

items.summary: Co-Scientist是一款基于Gemini构建的协作型AI伙伴，旨在帮助研究人员加速科学突破。该AI伙伴通过多智能体协作，为科研工作提供支持，提升研究效率。

items.title: AlphaEvolve: How our Gemini-powered coding agent is scaling impact across fields
items.content: Explore how AlphaEvolve's Gemini-powered algorithms are driving impact across business, infrastructure, and science.
items.contentSnippet: Explore how AlphaEvolve's Gemini-powered algorithms are driving impact across business, infrastructure, and science.

summaries.zh: AlphaEvolve是一款基于Gemini引擎的编程代理，其算法在商业、基础设施和科学领域推动影响扩展。该代理通过智能编程技术，助力不同行业实现高效创新，提升跨领域协作效率。

items.summary: AlphaEvolve是一款基于Gemini引擎的编程代理，其算法在商业、基础设施和科学领域推动影响扩展。该代理通过智能编程技术，助力不同行业实现高效创新，提升跨领域协作效率。

items.title: Enabling a new model for healthcare with AI co-clinician
items.content: Researching the path to AI-augmented care and development of an AI co-clinician.
items.contentSnippet: Researching the path to AI-augmented care and development of an AI co-clinician.

summaries.zh: 研究AI辅助医疗路径，开发AI协同医生新模式。探索AI与临床医生合作，推动医疗智能化发展。

items.title: Announcing our partnership with the Republic of Korea
items.content: Google DeepMind and Korea partner to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind and Korea partner to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models

summaries.zh: 谷歌DeepMind与韩国合作，利用前沿AI模型加速科学突破。

items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind与韩国合作，利用前沿AI模型加速科学突破。

items.title: Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training

summaries.zh:
文章标题：解耦式 DiLoCo：弹性分布式 AI 训练的新前沿

摘要：本文介绍了名为 DiLoCo 的新型解耦式分布式 AI 训练框架，旨在提升训练系统的弹性和效率。该框架通过解耦计算和通信过程，优化资源分配，增强容错能力，为大规模 AI 训练提供了新的解决方案。
